title: Kept Weather
tagline: A sky becomes a small companion you can keep from a link.
holy_shit: The weather over a real place can become a tiny living creature that still moves years later, with no server.
powered_by: Open-Meteo via /track extract + a Moment genome + browser rendering + QR keepsake links
agent_scenario: When you need to turn live place weather into a persistent, shareable, no-backend living artifact.
author: kody-w + Copilot
